meaning: n.(货物的)交托,交货,发货,运送,托付物,寄存物
examples: The first consignment of food was flown in yesterday.
She sold clothes on consignment to benefit homeless people.
These kinds of risks suit your consignment。
The UK will stop Low Value Consignment Relief in the Channel Islands in April.
Remember that just as with the gold dealer, the consignment shop will charge a commission.
